validations.name: confirm_no_cu_change
validations.command: git diff HEAD -- creeper_dripper/engine/trader.py creeper_dripper/storage/recovery.py | grep -E '^\+' | grep -E 'birdeye\.|token_overview|token_security|token_holder|token_creation_info|getSignatureStatuses|native_sol_balance' | grep -v '^\+\+\+' || echo 'CLEAN: no new Birdeye/RPC calls'
